title: How a Man of God Pursues Without Chasing
caption:
The man chasing God becomes the man worth wanting.

Most men have it backwards — they're so desperate for a wife they bring their emptiness to the relationship instead of their character. She can feel the difference. The man who needs her too much can't actually lead her.

Here's what it actually looks like to pursue with intention:

Know what you're building. Pursue openly — ask clearly, don't orbit and hint. Lead with who you're becoming. And let the relationship reveal you rather than define you.

"Delight yourself in the Lord, and he will give you the desires of your heart." — Psalm 37:4. He doesn't give you the girl first. He gives you the order that leads to her.

Save this. Share it with a brother who's got the order backwards.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #relationships #discipleship #christianity #scripture #theethosapp
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
